appliedUpdates.description: Added authentication patterns (session key handling, timing attack prevention) and test helper documentation (login_user/1 pattern)

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed Phoenix 1.8 patterns: using Layouts.app with current_scope assign, verified_routes (~p sigil), live_session with on_mount callbacks for route protection, and to_form for form handling.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: Phoenix 1.8 patterns are already documented in AGENTS.md

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly placed authentication plugs in the browser pipeline (fetch_current_user) rather than requiring manual plug calls per route.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: Standard Phoenix convention, not a novel discovery

rejectedObservations.observation: The phoenix-fullstack-worker skill was followed correctly: failing tests were written first, then implementation was added until tests passed.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: Skill procedure worked as intended, no skill updates needed
